name: browser-control
description: Unified browser, terminal, filesystem, and MCP automation engine for AI agents.

scripts.test:ci: node --require ts-node/register --require tsconfig-paths/register --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/action_result.test.ts tests/unit/config.test.ts tests/unit/policy_engine.test.ts tests/unit/execution_router.test.ts tests/unit/browser_actions.test.ts tests/unit/terminal_actions.test.ts tests/unit/fs_actions.test.ts tests/unit/broker_server.test.ts tests/unit/operator_doctor_status_setup.test.ts tests/unit/operator_cli.test.ts tests/unit/operator_config.test.ts tests/unit/stagehand_optional.test.ts tests/unit/project_structure.test.ts tests/unit/terminal_render.test.ts tests/unit/operator_dashboard.test.ts tests/unit/workflows.test.ts tests/unit/harness.test.ts tests/unit/packages.test.ts
scripts.test:browser-features: node --require ts-node/register --require tsconfig-paths/register --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/browser_features_regression.test.ts tests/unit/a11y_snapshot.test.ts tests/unit/cli.test.ts tests/unit/cli_debug_observability.test.ts tests/unit/observability/screencast.test.ts tests/unit/browser_connection.test.ts tests/unit/providers/local.test.ts tests/unit/mcp/tool_registry.test.ts
scripts.test:lifecycle: node --require ts-node/register --require tsconfig-paths/register --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-timeout=120000 tests/unit/daemon_launch.test.ts tests/unit/node_pty_windows_patch.test.ts tests/unit/process_leak_detection.test.ts tests/unit/api_term_exit.test.ts tests/unit/cli_term_exit.test.ts tests/unit/cold_start_exit.test.ts
